data.title: Founders Home Service Group Expands Middle Tennessee Footprint with Acquisition of The Air Guys LLC
data.description: In a recent transaction overseen by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions, The Air Guys LLC, a company specializing in HVAC and home services in Chapel Hill, Tennessee, was successfully acquired by Founders Home Service Group. Founders Home Service Group, a subsidiary of Kompass Kapital, completed the acquisition on March 24, 2026. This deal marks a significant milestone for both companies, with The Air Guys LLC bringing their expertise in the industry to the table. The specific financial figures involved in the transaction were not disclosed publicly.

data.title: CVAUSA Offers Heartflow Technology to Elevate Cardiovascular Diagnostics Across Its Expansive Network
data.description: By utilizing cutting-edge AI technology and 3D modeling, Heartflow offers cardiologists a non-invasive method for precise detection of coronary artery disease to enhance patient care. This advancement was presented in Orlando, Florida, on March 24, 2026, by Cardiovascular Associates of America (CVAUSA).

data.title: The 60-Day Transformation Model That Works: Life Time's 60XT Challenge Returns March 30
data.description: Life Time members can now sign up for the 60XT Challenge, an 8-week body transformation program designed to help achieve lasting change in time for summer. Participants will have access to an in-app workout program and habit tracking tools. The challenge offers prize packages worth over $27,000.

data.title: Global Wealth Architect Dr. Anna Maria Panasiuk Launches Bespoke Advisory Services for U.S. High-Net-Worth Individuals
data.description: An esteemed European wealth specialist, Dr. Anna Maria Panasiuk, is utilizing her extensive 25-year experience in cross-border affairs to assist American families in reducing systemic risk by recommending diversification across Swiss and EU jurisdictions. The collaboration spans across WARSAW, Poland; ZURICH; and NEW YORK, and is set to provide valuable insights into wealth management. This expert guidance aims to help families navigate the complexities of international financial systems and mitigate risks effectively.

data.title: Watercrest Myrtle Beach Assisted Living and Memory Care Earns the Reputation 800 Award for Two Consecutive Years
data.description: Watercrest Senior Living Group is pleased to share that Watercrest Myrtle Beach Assisted Living and Memory Care in Vero Beach, Florida, has received the prestigious 800 Award from Reputation for two years in a row. Reputation, a renowned global authority on reputation performance, bestowed this honor on the facility.

data.title: Simply Healthcare Foundation and Camillus House Share Positive Results from Multi-Year Grant Supporting Recovery for People Experiencing Homelessness
data.description: A recent grant from the Simply Healthcare Foundation in Miami is making a significant impact on homeless recovery efforts. The grant is specifically focused on improving access to care for homeless individuals, leading to notable outcomes such as increased success in treatment programs, improved housing stability, and a decrease in emergency room visits. This initiative is part of a larger effort to address the needs of the homeless population, highlighting the importance of community support in enhancing the well-being of vulnerable individuals.

data.title: More Perfect Partners with the Urban Libraries Council to Pilot Collaborations Between Local Libraries and Newsrooms to Strengthen Community-Centered Journalism
data.description: Public libraries and local news organizations are collaborating in pilot partnerships to involve community members in shaping local news, creating a replicable model. This initiative was launched by More Perfect, an American alliance focused on renewing democracy. The news was announced in Washington on March 24, 2026.

data.title: The Consulting Firm Behind How The World's Wealthiest Clients Are Treated Just Had A Record Year
data.description: In recent times, there has been a noticeable trend where ultra-high net worth (UHNW) and high net worth (HNW) clients are becoming increasingly discerning and less tolerant of imperfections. The AHA Group has emerged as the go-to firm in response to this shift. Breaking records in the luxury market, the firm has successfully conducted 87 engagements spanning 18 countries. This surge in activity is indicative of a booming year in premium sectors such as branded residences, private clubs, and ultra-luxury offerings, cementing The AHA Group's position as a leader in catering to the demands of discerning and affluent clientele.

data.title: Call for Entries: Globee® Awards for Artificial Intelligence Invite Organizations Across Asia-Pacific to Nominate Their Achievements
data.description: Today, the Globee® Awards, a business awards program that celebrates achievements in Artificial Intelligence at local, regional, and global levels, has opened nominations for 10 award categories. The awards program garners worldwide participation and aims to acknowledge outstanding contributions in the field of AI. The announcement was made in San Francisco on March 24, 2026.

data.title: HeartSciences to Present at Investor Summit Group Virtual Conference and Host Virtual One on One Investor Meetings
data.description: HeartSciences Inc., a healthcare IT company specializing in enhancing ECG through AI integration, will be participating in the Investor Summit Group Virtual Conference on March 25, 2026, at 12:30 pm ET. The company's stocks (Nasdaq: HSCS; HSCSW) will be discussed during the event. This presentation signifies HeartSciences' commitment to advancing ECG technology with the help of artificial intelligence, demonstrating their dedication to revolutionizing healthcare.

data.title: Rubin Rudman Partners Joseph Bodoff and Rion Vaughan Named to 2026 Lawdragon 500 Leading Global Bankruptcy & Restructuring Lawyers
data.description: In Boston on March 24, 2026, Rubin Rudman shared the news that Joseph Bodoff and Rion Vaughan, partners at the firm specializing in Bankruptcy and Creditors' Rights, have achieved recognition in the prestigious 2026 Lawdragon 500 Leading Global Bankruptcy & Restructuring Lawyers list. This acknowledgment highlights their expertise in the field, showcasing their exceptional skills to a global audience.

data.title: In HelloNation, Aesthetics Expert Becky Potts-Klinzing Explains PRF Treatment for Natural Skin Rejuvenation
data.description: In Racine, Wisconsin, on March 24, 2026, it was reported that platelet-rich fibrin (PRF) plays a crucial role in enhancing collagen production and promoting tissue repair, leading to a gradual and natural enhancement of skin quality. PRF treatment has gained popularity for its ability to help individuals achieve smoother skin and improved texture without requiring surgical intervention. This method harnesses the body's healing capabilities by using concentrated platelets to stimulate collagen growth. Through this process, PRF aids in rejuvenating the skin, making it appear healthier and more youthful.

data.title: Academic Year in America Celebrates 45 Years of Bridging Divides Through High School Exchange
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut on March 24, 2026, Director of Academic Year in America (AYA), Michele Kabel, draws attention to the importance of high school exchange programs amidst increasing global divisions. AYA, with a 45-year history, stands as a shining example of fostering international understanding and unity through academic exchanges.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq Give Back Gains; Netgear Soars, Micron Falls (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline as oil prices bounced back. A notable player in the stock market today is Netgear, showing significant movement. The market saw the Dow and Nasdaq retracting gains. Netgear soared while Micron faced a fall in stock value. This dynamic shift in the market was observed in live coverage, demonstrating the fluctuations in the numbers.

data.title: Automotive Cybersecurity Market to Reach US$12,302.1 Million by 2033 Expands Amid Connected Vehicle Growth and Rising Cyber Threats  - Persistence Market Research
data.description: In London on March 24, 2026, it was reported that the worldwide automotive cybersecurity market is experiencing significant growth. Projections indicate a value of approximately US$ 4,050.3 million by the year 2026, with expectations to increase to US$ 12,302.1 million by 2033. It is anticipated that there will be a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 17.2% in the forthcoming years driving this expansion. This surge in the market is attributed to...

data.title: Small businesses are struggling with $378 billion in Covid relief loans, repayment challenges persist.
data.description: A total of $378 billion has been lent by the Small Business Administration to assist struggling businesses amidst the economic downturn. However, facing challenges with repayment, the process is proving to be arduous for both the borrowers and lenders.

data.title: Jobley Named a Leader by G2, the World's Largest Software Marketplace
data.description: With an impressive user rating of 4.4 out of 5, Jobley has been acknowledged for its exceptional customer satisfaction and significant market position in the Job Search Sites sector. The company, based in Bellevue, Washington, received this recognition on March 24, 2026. Specializing in connecting U.S. dental and healthcare professionals with job opportunities, Jobley continues to strengthen its presence in the industry.
